introSection: Cagliostro is a steel enclosed spinning roller coaster located at MagicLand in Valmontone, Lazio, Italy.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Riders sit back to back, facing away from each other.

fullText:
Cagliostro is a steel enclosed spinning roller coaster located at MagicLand in Valmontone, Lazio, Italy.



Riders sit back to back, facing away from each other.
